fault_hypothesis: On line 65, the average is computed by dividing `total` by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the series has fewer elements than the window, this produces an incorrectly small average.

constraints.intent: After computing avg, it should equal total divided by the actual number of samples in tail, not by window.
avg must equal total divided by the actual tail length, not the window size.

spec.expr: len(tail__1) == window or abs(avg__1 - total__1 / len(tail__1)) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: Before avg is returned or logged, it should only equal total/window when tail is exactly window-sized; otherwise it should be total/len(tail).

spec.expr: __cbfl_result is None or abs(__cbfl_result - sum(series[-window:]) / len(series[-window:])) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: The returned average should be the mean of the actual tail samples, not total divided by window.
